2605.30085.title: Conformal Certification of Reasoning Trace Prefixes
2605.30085.paper_summary: Language model reasoning traces are rarely all-or-nothing; they frequently contain valid intermediate steps before a critical error occurs. Existing uncertainty quantification methods typically certify final answers or entire responses, failing to provide statistical guarantees for the proportion of a sequential trace that can be safely retained. To address this, we introduce CROP (Conformal Reasoning Output Prefixes), a verifier-agnostic calibration procedure for clean-prefix certification. Given any step-level risk proxy, CROP selects a calibrated threshold and returns the longest contiguous prefix whose step risk proxies remain below it, routing the uncertified suffix for downstream review or repair. Assuming exchangeability, CROP rigorously controls the marginal probability that the returned prefix contains an annotated error. Across six process-labeled reasoning datasets, we demonstrate that standard step-level metrics such as AUROC do not fully capture prefix utility, suggesting verifiers should instead be evaluated by certified prefix length. Furthermore, CROP balances over- and under-withholding, improving downstream repair accuracy by preserving valid intermediate reasoning while discarding misleading suffixes. Ultimately, this work positions prefix certification as a rigorous, practical bridge between process supervision, abstention, and repair.
2605.30085.paper_summary_zh: 語言模型推理的痕跡很少是全有或全無的；它們經常在發生關鍵錯誤之前包含有效的中間步驟。現有的不確定性量化方法通常僅認證最終答案或整個回應，未能提供對於可以安全保留的序列痕跡比例的統計保證。為了解決這個問題，我們引入了 CROP（符合推理輸出前綴），這是一種與驗證器無關的校準程序，用於乾淨前綴的認證。給定任何步驟級別的風險代理，CROP 選擇一個校準的閾值，並返回其步驟風險代理保持在該閾值以下的最長連續前綴，將未認證的後綴路由到下游審查或修復。假設可交換性，CROP 嚴格控制返回的前綴包含註釋錯誤的邊際概率。在六個過程標記的推理數據集上，我們證明標準的步驟級別指標，如 AUROC，並未完全捕捉前綴的效用，這表明驗證器應該根據認證的前綴長度來進行評估。此外，CROP 在過度和不足保留之間取得平衡，通過保留有效的中間推理同時丟棄誤導性的後綴，從而提高下游修復的準確性。最終，這項工作將前綴認證定位為過程監督、放棄和修復之間的一座嚴謹且實用的橋樑。
2605.30085.author: Matt Y. Cheung et.al.
2605.30085.authors: Matt Y. Cheung, Ashok Veeraraghavan, Hanjie Chen, Guha Balakrishnan
